## Validation

<!-- List the exact commands, tests, or manual checks you ran. -->

## Safety and release impact

- [ ] No personal photos, credentials, model caches, local databases, or generated
      frontend output are included
- [ ] Public demo permissions and temporary-gallery isolation remain enforced
- [ ] User-visible changes are recorded in `CHANGELOG.md`
